name: $eventData
description: Returns a field value from the data passed to the currently executing custom event. Only valid inside event handler commands.

args.name: default
args.description: Value to return if the key does not exist in the event data.

name: $eventExists
description: Returns whether a custom event with the given name is defined.

name: $eventFields
description: Returns a separated list of the declared field names for a custom event.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator between field names. Defaults to ", ".

name: $eventFiredAt
description: Returns the ISO 8601 timestamp of when the current custom event was fired.

name: $eventList
description: Returns a separated list of all defined custom event names.

args.name: separator
args.description: Separator between event names. Defaults to ", ".

name: $eventName
description: Returns the name of the currently executing custom event.

name: $fireEvent
description: Fires a custom event, running all commands registered for it. The Discord context is automatically forwarded from the calling command so all ForgeScript context functions work in handlers.

args.name: eventName
args.description: The name of the event to fire.

args.name: data
args.description: Key-value pairs in the format key:value.
